overview.summary: Model score 5 vs user score 6 (gap -1). Primary drivers: Motion / Restlessness, Session Duration. Agreement classification: USER_HIGHER.

result.why_difference: Model relied more heavily on objective sensor stability, while user-reported distraction tolerance was lower than inferred.

prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.audio: Audio trend captured noise profile correctly, but distraction weighting should increase when speech overlaps sustained ambient noise.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.vitals: Physiological indicators should be used as supporting evidence, not a dominant signal, when environmental noise is primary.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.motion: Motion context should stabilize interpretation, not override adverse audio conditions.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.gps: GPS changes should trigger context shift checks, but not directly drive concentration score changes.

judgment_policy_next_run: Apply stronger session-specific context weighting over historical baseline anchoring.
Add readiness-context interaction terms for activity and environment mismatch.
